mapper.insert: insert into question (que_num, tet_num, que_seq, que_text, que_opt1, que_opt2, que_opt3, que_opt4, que_answer, que_desc, que_point) values (#{que_num}, #{tet_num}, #{que_seq}, #{que_text}, #{que_opt1}, #{que_opt2}, #{que_opt3}, #{que_opt4}, #{que_answer}, #{que_desc}, #{que_point})
mapper.select: select * from question where tet_num = #{tet_num} order by que_num
mapper.update: update question set que_text = #{que_text}, que_opt1 = #{que_opt1}, que_opt2 = #{que_opt2}, que_opt3 = #{que_opt3}, que_opt4 = #{que_opt4}, que_answer = #{que_answer}, que_desc = #{que_desc} where que_num = #{que_num}
